headline: 2 AI Infrastructure Stocks TD Cowen Thinks Investors Should Own
summary: AI is setting off one of the largest infrastructure build-outs the tech world has seen. Cloud giants, governments, and startups are pouring enormous sums into new data centers designed to train and run advanced AI models. Much of the discussion tends to revolve around the chips doing the heavy lifting. Yet, another piece of the puzzle matters just as much – how all those machines communicate with one another. Modern AI clusters contain thousands of processors working together at the same time. F
